product_overview: Parlour Studio Website is a single-page, motion-rich salon site built with React, GSAP, Framer Motion and Supabase. Users can browse the hero and portfolio, filter and multi-select services, book appointments with a custom calendar, and receive a downloadable confirmation ticket.
core_goals: Introduce the brand with a full-screen animated intro that reveals the main site experience.
Let visitors read dynamic hero and about content sourced from the CMS.
Enable discovery of studio portfolio via a horizontally scrollable gallery and full-screen modal.
Allow browsing services by category and multi-selecting services to build a booking.
Support end-to-end appointment booking: pick services → select a date → provide contact details → submit and receive a confirmation ticket.
Provide contact and reserve calls-to-action so visitors can quickly book or reach out.
Surface studio profile and animated stats to build trust and credibility.
Ensure the core user flows work on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.

features.name: Premium Intro Animation
features.description: A full-screen branded intro animation plays on first load then unmounts to reveal the main site with a fade transition.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See full-screen intro animation play with scanning bar -> Wait for animation to complete automatically -> See main site content fade in and become scrollable
Navigate to / on a mobile viewport -> Intro fills the viewport and plays fully -> Main site content appears after completion

features.name: Navigation Bar with Drawer
features.description: Fixed glassmorphism top navigation with a right-side GSAP-animated drawer; nav links smooth-scroll to page sections and drawer closes on selection or backdrop click.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See fixed nav bar with logo and menu control -> Click MENU hamburger button to open navigation drawer -> See staggered nav links appear -> Click HOME nav link to smooth-scroll to hero section -> Drawer closes
Open navigation drawer -> Click STUDIO nav link to smooth-scroll to studio-work section -> Drawer closes
Open navigation drawer -> Click backdrop or the drawer close control -> Drawer closes without navigating
Navigate to / -> Click logo -> Page scrolls to top / hero section

features.name: Floating Book Now and WhatsApp Buttons
features.description: Fixed floating button group at bottom-right: a WhatsApp link and a BOOK NOW control that triggers a wave transition and reveals the booking form. Button text updates when services are selected.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See WhatsApp and BOOK NOW floating buttons at bottom-right -> Hover/tap BOOK NOW to see micro-animation
Navigate to / -> Click WhatsApp green button -> WhatsApp chat URL opens in a new tab
Navigate to / -> Click BOOK NOW pink button with no services selected -> Wave transition plays and booking form is revealed below the reserve section
Select 2 services in the catalog -> Floating BOOK NOW button updates to 'BOOK 2 SESSIONS' -> Click 'BOOK 2 SESSIONS' -> Booking form is revealed

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Full-viewport hero with animated background and dynamically fetched main heading, subtitle, and status label.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> After intro completes see hero section fill the viewport with animated background -> See main heading text rendered from Supabase header.main_heading -> See subtitle and status label rendered from Supabase

features.name: Studio Work Horizontal Gallery
features.description: Horizontally-scrollable portfolio gallery with desktop drag momentum and mobile touch snap; a 'See All Works' control opens a full-screen modal grid.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to studio-work section -> On desktop drag the gallery horizontally with mouse -> Release to observe spring momentum and edge bounce
Navigate to / -> Scroll to studio-work section on mobile -> Scroll gallery cards horizontally with touch -> Cards snap to nearest card

Scroll to studio-work section -> Click See All Works button -> Full-screen gallery modal opens -> Scroll modal vertically to view images -> Hover images in modal to reveal color and title overlay -> Click X in modal header to close modal -> Backdrop click closes modal

features.name: About Section
features.description: Brand philosophy section with dynamic text values (days, hours) and a TiltedCard image that tilts in 3D on hover.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to about section -> See 'CRAFTED IN CHAOS' heading and philosophy description and AVAILABLE DAYS and TIMING SLOTS values rendered from Supabase -> See tilted image card on the right
Scroll to about section on desktop -> Hover over the TiltedCard -> Card tilts with 3D effect in response to cursor movement

features.name: Services Catalog with Category Filters and Multi-Select
features.description: Full-width services catalog fetched from Supabase with dynamic category filters and multi-select service cards that update a running total and present a BOOK N SESSIONS CTA.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to catalog section -> See category filter buttons (ALL plus unique categories) and service cards grouped by category
In catalog -> Click a category filter button to filter services by that category -> Only services for the chosen category are shown
In catalog -> Click ALL filter -> All services are shown again
In catalog -> Click a service card to select it -> See the card highlighted and marked as selected -> Click the same card again to deselect it
Select multiple services -> See encouragement message appear and total investment update -> See BOOK N SESSIONS button appear -> Click BOOK N SESSIONS -> Booking form is revealed via wave transition

features.name: Appointment Booking Form
features.description: Multi-field booking form with Name, Email (format validation), Phone, Date (calendar popup), Services panel, live total, and map embed; validated before submission and leads to a confirmation ticket on success.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Reveal booking form via BOOK NOW or Reserve CTA -> See Name, Email, Phone, Date, Services fields loaded
In booking form -> Type name in Name input -> Type valid email in Email input -> Type phone number in Phone input (digits, +, dash, spaces permitted)
In booking form -> Click calendar icon -> SimpleCalendar popup opens -> Select a date -> Calendar closes and date displays in DD-MM-YYYY format
In booking form -> Click ADD SERVICES -> ServicePanel opens -> Toggle services on/off -> Selected services appear in the booking form and total updates
Fill all required fields and select at least one service -> Click START SESSION -> Form submits and confirmation ticket appears
Click START SESSION with Name empty -> See validation error 'FILL THIS FIRST' under Name field
Click START SESSION with Email invalid (e.g. 'invalidemail') -> See validation error 'INVALID EMAIL FORMAT' under Email field
Click START SESSION with no services selected -> See validation error 'SELECT PROTOCOL' and form does not submit

features.name: Appointment Confirmation Ticket
features.description: A styled confirmation ticket shown after successful booking with booking details, CONFIRMED badge, CANCEL (resets form) and DOWNLOAD (saves PNG) actions.
user_flows: Complete booking submission with valid inputs -> See confirmation ticket with salon label, CONFIRMED badge, booking name, email, phone, date, total investment, and selected services
On confirmation ticket -> Click DOWNLOAD button -> Ticket is saved as a PNG file
On confirmation ticket -> Click CANCEL button -> Confirmation closes and booking form resets to empty state

features.name: Archive Studio Profile Section
features.description: Studio/personnel profile with mission text and four animated stat counters that count up when scrolled into view.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to archive-details section -> See personnel record label, profile name, professional title, and brand quote on the left -> See mission heading and four stat counters on the right
Scroll the archive-details section into view -> Observe the stat counters animate from 0 to their target values

features.name: Reserve CTA Section
features.description: Full-width pink call-to-action with RESERVE NOW heading, contextual copy and a Book Appointment button that opens the booking form via the same wave animation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to Reserve CTA section -> See RESERVE NOW heading and availability description text on pink background -> See Book Appointment button
In Reserve CTA -> Click Book Appointment button -> Wave transition plays and booking form is revealed

features.name: Footer with Contact Links and Social Icons
features.description: White footer with clickable phone and email links and social icons that open external pages; a large animated footer title sits at the bottom.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> See phone number and email address and social icons listed in the footer
In footer -> Click the phone number -> Device/browser opens phone dialer with the number
In footer -> Click the email link -> Gmail compose opens in a new tab
In footer -> Click Instagram, Gmail or Facebook icons -> Corresponding external link opens in a new tab -> Hover each icon to see its brand-color hover effect

features.name: Supabase Real-Time Content Sync
features.description: Site subscribes to Supabase real-time updates for site content, services and gallery so content refreshes without a full page reload.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Site fetches content from Supabase and displays dynamic content
With the site open in a background tab -> Return focus to the tab -> Site re-fetches content to ensure it is current

routes.description: Single-page application with all sections - intro animation, hero, studio work gallery, about, services catalog, reserve CTA, appointment booking form, booking confirmation ticket, archive/profile stats, and footer

features.name: Premium Intro Animation
features.description: Full-screen branded PremiumIntro animation plays on every page load. A scanning bar sweeps across the screen. After completion the intro unmounts and the main site fades in.
user_interactions: View full-screen intro animation on page load
Wait for animation to complete automatically
See main site content fade in after intro

features.name: Navigation Bar with Drawer
features.description: Fixed glassmorphism nav bar at top. Logo on the left, hamburger MENU button on the right. Clicking hamburger opens a GSAP-animated right-side drawer with staggered nav links - HOME, STUDIO, ABOUT, CATALOG, RESERVE NOW. Clicking a link smooth-scrolls to the section and closes the drawer.
user_interactions: Click MENU hamburger button to open navigation drawer
Click HOME nav link to scroll to hero section
Click STUDIO nav link to scroll to studio-work section
Click ABOUT nav link to scroll to about section
Click CATALOG nav link to scroll to catalog section
Click RESERVE NOW nav link to scroll to footer/reserve section
Click X close button inside drawer to close it
Click backdrop behind drawer to close it
Click logo to scroll to top/hero

features.name: Floating Book Now and WhatsApp Buttons
features.description: Fixed floating button group at bottom-right corner. Green WhatsApp button opens WhatsApp URL. Pink BOOK NOW button triggers wave SVG transition animation and reveals the appointment booking form below the reserve section. When services are selected, button text updates to BOOK N SESSION(S).
user_interactions: Click WhatsApp green button to open WhatsApp link in new tab
Click BOOK NOW pink button to trigger page transition and reveal booking form
See button text update to BOOK N SESSIONS when N services are selected

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Full-screen hero section with animated HeroSbg background, decorative dashed border overlay, and text content. Dynamic main heading, subtitle, and status label fetched from Supabase site_content (section header). Fade-in motion animation on load.
user_interactions: View main heading text rendered from Supabase header.main_heading
View subtitle text rendered from Supabase header.subtitle
View status label rendered from Supabase header.status_label

features.name: Studio Work Horizontal Gallery
features.description: Horizontal scrolling gallery of portfolio images fetched from Supabase gallery table (type=portfolio). Desktop uses mouse drag with spring momentum and edge bounce via native scrollLeft. Mobile uses native touch scroll with snap. Gallery cards show title at bottom, grayscale by default, color on hover. See All Works button opens a full-screen modal grid of all gallery items.
user_interactions: Drag gallery slider horizontally on desktop with mouse
Scroll gallery cards on mobile with touch gesture
Click See All Works button to open full-screen gallery modal
Scroll gallery modal vertically to see all images
Hover gallery images in modal to see color and title overlay
Click X button in modal header to close gallery modal
Click backdrop/overlay area at top of modal to close it

features.name: About Section
features.description: Brand philosophy section. Left side shows CRAFTED IN CHAOS heading, philosophy text, available days, and timing/hours from Supabase site_content (section about). Right side shows TiltedCard component with 3D tilt effect on hover displaying about image.
user_interactions: View philosophy heading CRAFTED IN CHAOS
View philosophy description text
View AVAILABLE DAYS label and days value (e.g. MON - SAT)
View TIMING SLOTS label and hours value (e.g. 10:00 AM - 11:00 PM)
Hover over TiltedCard image to see 3D tilt effect

features.name: Services Catalog with Category Filters and Multi-Select
features.description: Full-width services catalog showing all services from Supabase grouped by category. Top has category filter buttons (ALL plus unique categories). Clicking a category shows only those services. Clicking a service card toggles selection with pink border highlight and checkmark. Multiple services can be selected. When services are selected, an encouragement message and total price appear with a BOOK N SESSIONS button.
user_interactions: Click category filter button to filter services by category
Click ALL filter to show all services
Click service card to select it (highlighted with pink border and checkmark)
Click selected service card again to deselect it
See encouragement message when 1 or more services selected
See total investment price when services selected
Click BOOK N SESSIONS button to trigger booking form

features.name: Appointment Booking Form
features.description: Multi-step booking form revealed after BOOK NOW. Contains Name field, Email field with format validation, Phone field (digits/+/dash only), Date field with calendar popup and manual text input, Services panel for adding/removing services with live total, and Google Maps embed (visible on desktop in grid, on mobile after submit button). Form validates all fields on submit. On success saves to Supabase appointments table. On error shows error message.
user_interactions: Type name in Name input field
Type email in Email input field
Type phone number in Phone input field (only digits, +, dash, spaces)
Click calendar icon to open SimpleCalendar popup
Select a date in the calendar popup
See date displayed in DD-MM-YYYY format after selection
Click ADD SERVICES button to open ServicePanel popup
Toggle services on and off in ServicePanel
Remove a selected service using the X button next to it
See total price update when services added or removed
Click START SESSION submit button to submit the booking
See validation error FILL THIS FIRST when Name is empty
See validation error FILL THIS FIRST when Email is empty
See validation error INVALID EMAIL FORMAT when email is invalid
See validation error FILL THIS FIRST when Phone is empty
See validation error SELECT DATE when date is not selected
See validation error SELECT PROTOCOL when no services are selected
See vibration animation on error messages
See error clear when user starts typing in that field

features.name: Appointment Confirmation Ticket
features.description: After successful booking submission to Supabase, a styled confirmation ticket appears showing salon name, CONFIRMED badge, booking name, email, phone, date, total investment, and list of selected services. CANCEL button resets the form. DOWNLOAD button saves the ticket as a PNG using html2canvas.
user_interactions: View confirmation ticket with all booking details after successful submission
Click CANCEL button to reset form and hide confirmation
Click DOWNLOAD button to download ticket as PNG image file

features.name: Archive Studio Profile Section
features.description: Studio/personnel profile section below the booking area. Left column shows personnel record label, profile name, professional title, and brand quote from Supabase profile section. Right column shows mission label, mission heading, and 4 animated stat counters (ESTABLISHED, STAFF COUNT, SUCCESS RATE, RATINGS) that count up from 0 when scrolled into view using CountUpText component.
user_interactions: Scroll to archive-details section to see stats count up from 0
View personnel record label and name
View mission heading text
View ESTABLISHED, STAFF COUNT, SUCCESS RATE, RATINGS stat values

features.name: Reserve CTA Section
features.description: Pink (#E0A9C5) full-width call-to-action section with a large RESERVE NOW heading, booking description text, and a Book Appointment button with hover color change. All text from Supabase bookNow settings. Button triggers the same wave animation and reveals the booking form.
user_interactions: View RESERVE NOW heading on pink background
View availability description text
Click Book Appointment button to trigger booking form (hover changes button to black/pink)
Hover over button to see color change animation

features.name: Footer with Contact Links and Social Icons
features.description: White footer with copyright text on top-left, clickable phone number (tel link), clickable email (opens Gmail compose in new tab), and Instagram/Gmail/Facebook social icons with brand-color hover effects (Instagram gradient, Gmail red, Facebook blue). Large animated FooterTitle text at the bottom.
user_interactions: Click phone number to trigger tel link (phone dialer)
Click email link to open Gmail compose in new tab
Click Instagram icon to open Instagram URL in new tab
Hover Instagram icon to see brand gradient color
Click Gmail icon to open Gmail compose in new tab
Hover Gmail icon to see red color
Click Facebook icon to open Facebook URL in new tab
Hover Facebook icon to see blue color

known_limitations.issue: Google Maps iframe requires a valid map_embed URL set in Supabase (site_content book_now section) to display
known_limitations.impact: Map shows blank if map_embed is empty string or not set in Supabase

known_limitations.issue: Gallery drag on desktop uses native scrollLeft; GSAP Draggable is initialized but native mouse events are prioritized
known_limitations.impact: Spring bounce momentum may vary by browser; touch scroll always works on mobile

known_limitations.issue: html2canvas ticket download may fail with cross-origin font resources
known_limitations.impact: Ticket PNG may have missing text if fonts fail to load cross-origin

known_limitations.issue: ServicePanel and SimpleCalendar are React lazy-loaded; first open shows LOADING fallback briefly on slow connections
known_limitations.impact: Minor UX delay on first calendar or service panel open
